name: 2005 Iranian Presidential Election
description: The 2005 presidential election resulted in the surprise victory of Tehran mayor [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) over [Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani) in a run-off. Ahmadinejad ran as a populist outsider against the establishment, backed by the [Alliance of Builders of Islamic Iran](/orgs/alliance-of-builders-of-islamic-iran) and networks within the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) and [Basij](/orgs/basij). [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi), who initially led in first-round results before official tallies shifted, alleged fraud. The election marked the beginning of a sharp turn toward hardline populism.
